name: manage_knowledge
summary: Persistent knowledge base of durable facts. Pages are markdown files addressed by slug.
The index (one-line summary per page) is injected into the system prompt at each ticket start. Use `read` to load full pages on demand.
constraints: Save when work reveals a durable fact future tickets need.
Each page covers one topic. Slug is descriptive: `deployment-config`, `error-handling`.
The summary is one sentence shown in the index. Keep it under 80 chars.
Use `[[slug]]` wikilinks in page content to cross-reference related pages.
`write` is an upsert: it overwrites the full page. Use `read` first if appending.
The index has a char limit. When full, consolidate: merge pages, remove stale ones.
anti_patterns: Saving task progress or TODOs. Those belong in tickets.
Creating a new page for every small fact. Consolidate related facts.
Acting on a `write` from the same ticket. Mid-ticket writes do not update the system prompt.

slug.description: Page identifier (lowercase, hyphens, max 60 chars). Required for write/read/remove.

summary.description: One-line index summary (<80 chars). Required for write.

content.description: Full page body in markdown. May include [[wikilinks]]. Required for write.
